_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the Send SMTP Mail Message auth / Basic-Auth-disabled sub-case (Branch 2 of send-smtp-mail-failures); mock dispatcher only. The M365 server rejects the Basic-Auth SMTP login with 535 5.7.139 basic authentication is disabled — the credentials are correct; the auth mechanism is off. docsai proxied; --level Error logs rule precedes the generic logs rule. Token-aware matching, first match wins.
